_source: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Appendix 4 Table 4D5A — transcribed Sprint C.2 from industry-standard references; engineer-verify against published edition before runtime use.
_title: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Appendix 4 Table 4D5A — 70°C PVC insulated, SWA armoured, multi-core, copper
_note: Steel wire armoured (SWA) cable with 70°C PVC insulation. Two-core (single-phase) ratings listed. For three-phase (3-core), ratings are nominally similar — check published table for exact column. Armour counts as CPC when properly bonded. Always verify against purchased copy of BS 7671:2018+A2:2022.

_units.mVAm: millivolts per ampere per metre (voltage drop)

installation_methods.C: Clipped direct to a non-metallic surface or on cable tray
installation_methods.D: Direct buried in ground (depth 0.5–0.7 m, soil thermal resistivity 2.5 K·m/W)

table_4d5a_pvc_swa_copper._reference: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Table 4D5A — 70°C PVC insulated, armoured (SWA), multi-core, copper
table_4d5a_pvc_swa_copper._note: Values for 2-core SWA single-phase circuit. Method D assumes standard burial conditions per BS 7671 Appendix 4 notes.

method_C._formation: Armoured PVC SWA cable clipped direct to non-metallic surface

method_D._formation: Armoured PVC SWA cable direct buried in ground, depth 0.5–0.7 m, soil resistivity 2.5 K·m/W
method_D._note: Direct burial gives higher continuous rating than surface methods due to soil heat sink. Standard burial conditions per BS 7671 Appendix 4 Section 4.3.
method_D._TODO: Verify all rating_A values against BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Table 4D5A Method D column in published edition. Values below are engineering estimates consistent with 4D4A XLPE-SWA buried column ratios; not confirmed from primary source.

usage_notes.cable_type: This table applies to 70°C PVC insulated SWA armoured cable only. For XLPE/thermosetting insulated SWA (90°C), use table_4d4a in appendix4-cable-ratings.json. PVC-SWA gives lower ratings than XLPE-SWA at same CSA.
usage_notes.three_phase: Three-phase ratings (3-core SWA) are broadly similar to 2-core single-phase values for the same CSA. Check published Table 4D5A for exact 3-phase column. De-rating for grouping applies per reg521-installation-methods.json.
usage_notes.method_D_status: Method D values carry pending_engineer_transcription status. Do NOT use for final design without verifying against published BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 Table 4D5A.
usage_notes.armouring_as_cpc: SWA armour may serve as CPC where earthed at both ends and resistance meets Regulation 543.1. Verify armour cross-section using calc.cpc_adiabatic.
usage_notes.correction_factors: Apply correction factors from appendix4-correction-factors.json. Burial depth, soil resistivity, and grouping factors all apply for Method D.
usage_notes.burial_conditions: Method D values assume standard depth 0.5–0.7 m, soil thermal resistivity 2.5 K·m/W. Correction factors apply for different depths or resistivities.
